subject: fix(security,ux,a11y): full audit sweep — XSS, touch targets, skip link, safe areas
body:
Security (critical):
- Fix XSS in inlineMarkdown(): escape HTML before formatting, validate
  link hrefs via isSafeUrl() protocol allowlist
- Escape meta.tech array before inserting into HTML
- Validate meta.liveUrl/repoUrl protocols (reject javascript:/data:)

Bug fix (critical):
- Random theme toggle stores String(newState) instead of boolean

PWA fixes:
- Fix Escape listener leak in install modal (cleaned up on all paths)
- Add .catch() on deferredPrompt.userChoice and doc file fetches
- Remove dead needsRefresh variable
- Add data-close to install menu button (closes burger menu)
- Add safe area insets to update banner and install modal

Mobile/Accessibility:
- Bump card action buttons from btn-xs to btn-sm for 44px touch targets
- Add skip-to-content link on both pages
- Add OG meta tags for social sharing previews
- Add 10s AbortController timeout on project metadata fetch

Docs:
- Update README (35 themes, not 8 combos)
- Update PWA_SYSTEM.md version (^1.2.0)

Tags: security, xss, accessibility, mobile, pwa, ux, documentation
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: audit-sweep
Semver: patch
